name: USS LCI(L)-603 (LCI(L)-603)
events: 5 Sep 1945 USS Blackfin (Lt.Cdr. W.L. Kitch, USN) ended her 5th war patrol at Guam. She was escorted in by USS LCI(L)-603 (Lt.(jg). H.E. McMath, Jr., USNR).
5 Sep 1945 USS Catfish (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Overton, USNR) ended her 1st war patrol at Guam. She was escorted in by USS LCI(L)-603 (Lt.(jg). H.E. McMath, Jr., USNR).
